title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery tutorial on building JobPilot, a full-stack AI job application platform in 2026. The workflow emphasizes system design around AI agents using context files and open-source agent skills to prevent agent drift. Integration with InsForge, Browserbase, PostHog, and Adzuna job discovery API.
